DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE

ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2022 Continued To Jun-16-22 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Plaintiff
Off Calendar Dec-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Seana Azad of POND NORTH LLP (415-217-1240), appearing for defendant FMC Corporation.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest for Deceased Plaintiff is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 377.31. No opposition filed. Jenna Carpenter is substituted as successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff Otto Gisler. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
